description: Style NoteThe Outback from adidas is a lifestyle shoe - a modern, lightweight reinterpretation of the humble sneaker. Crafted from the highest quality materials, the upper features stylish, understated perforation details and the classic 3-Stripes, giving an Adidas twist that makes this shoe top our wish-list for the season! Class up your casual act with this stylish sneaker. Recommended for casual wear looks best when worn with a matching leather jacket.Product DetailsBrown shoe with nubuck and suede leather upper, central lace-ups, overlays, perforations on the toe region and Adidas 3-stripes embossing at the midfoot regionPadded innerOutsole adhered to the upperTextured TPU outsole with ladder shaped lugsMaterial and CareNubuck, suedeWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
